validated_data.description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) provides health coverage of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year to economically vulnerable families listed in SECC 2011.
validated_data.benefit: Cashless treatment up to Rs. 5 lakh per year
validated_data.application_process: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card.
